patch.value: Fix slow/oversized local vector snapshot and mislabeled search fallback

Two search subsystem fixes. (1) PERF: persistLanceDbLocalTable serialized the local vector snapshot with JSON.stringify(obj,null,2) — pretty-printing put every embedding float on its own indented line, ~doubling file size and parse/serialize cost on every mutation and semantic query. Switched to compact JSON (internal, gitignored cache; JSON.parse is whitespace-agnostic). Measured dev-repo snapshot 33MB->19MB, stringify 195ms->98ms. (2) CORRECTNESS: undici (Node fetch) collapses connection errors to 'fetch failed' with the real code on error.cause.code, so a downed Ollama was mislabeled 'error' instead of 'connection' in semantic fallback warnings. Now walks the cause chain. Also corrected the inaccurate 'Mutations do not auto-embed by default' stale-index warning copy.
Snapshot serialized compactly; downed-backend fallback labeled connection; warning copy accurate
Fixed: compact local snapshot + accurate connection-class fallback labeling.

Compact snapshot in vector-stores.ts persistLanceDbLocalTable (33MB->19MB, stringify 195->98ms); cause-chain classifier in search.ts + corrected stale-index warning. Tests: vector-store-adapter.spec (compact assertion), search-command.spec all green.
